description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a robust polymer and metal construction. The rifle has a fixed stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling, with a detachable box magazine inserted below the receiver. Along the top, a full-length Picatinny rail is present, supporting flip-up iron sights at both the front and rear. The barrel is of standard length and is capped with a simple thread protector, lacking any advanced muzzle device. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments and tactical operations.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, and flip-up iron sights on a full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, magazine, and both flip-up iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, front sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine, and the full length of the Picatinny rail.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the Picatinny rail, iron sights, and the overall slimness of the rifle.
